title: Hygiplas Unigloves Unicare Clear Vinyl GS0065-A Examination - Multipurpose, Powder Free and Latex Free Disposable Gloves, Box of 100 Gloves, Clear, Extra Large (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Latex free vinyl with a powder free finish for comfortable, easy donning that helps prevent hands from drying out, designed for use in dentistry, food processing and general cleaning work
These medical grade gloves are made from clear, optimal quality vinyl which is latex free and helps to minimise particulate contamination whether you're dealing with food prep, cleaning or painting
Suitable for those with latex allergies (Type I sensitisation and Type IV hypersensitivity), with a comfortable, ambidextrous fit so you don't have to split a pair to replace a damaged glove
Light, comfortable and easy to wear thanks to soft, powder free vinyl and a medium weight construction that provides a balance of strength and sensitivity, for easy handling of food and substances
Clear Vinyl examination glove, food safe, powder free, AQL 1.5 in clear
description: Product Description Our Unicare disposable glove range has been developed to provide exceptional levels of comfort and includes gloves manufactured in nitrile, vinyl, vinyl/nitrile hybrid blend, latex and polyethylene. Unicare gloves consist of both non-medical and medical grade options which are particularly suited to use in healthcare examination, dental and veterinary care. Legal Disclaimer uk mainland delivery only
